---
name: Connector Request
about: Suggest a new content source connector
labels: connector, enhancement
---

## Source

What service/tool should Trove connect to? (e.g., Notion, Figma, Discord, Obsidian)

## What content would it index?

Describe what items would be indexed (pages, files, channels, etc.)

## API availability

Is there a public API? Link to docs if possible.

## Would you like to build it?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to contribute this connector
- [ ] No, just suggesting
